observer: orchestrating agent (Claude) via powerbi-cli desktop screenshot oracle; screenshots reviewed visually, retained outside the repo
method: report pages set-active --in-place per page between oracle runs (no UI interaction used)
each run: windowObserved=true, titleMatched=true (VisualCatalogProof), screenshot captured, cleanup closed=true, zero remaining PBIDesktop/msmdsrv processes

observations.issueDialogs: none; only the standard 'Some of the tables have incomplete or no data' pre-refresh banner
observations.pieProof: healthy titled visual placeholder 'Total Amount by Category'; no unknown-visual or repair placeholder
observations.donutProof: healthy titled visual placeholder; no error placeholder
observations.matrixProof: pivotTable renders structural skeleton pre-refresh: Category/Total column headers and Total row visible
observations.slicerProof: slicer renders with 'Category' header, empty list, no persisted selections
observations.lineControl: not individually screenshotted; page tab present (family already Desktop-proven in prior archetypes)

provenLevel: desktop-definition-acceptance: Desktop opens the project and instantiates pieChart, donutChart, pivotTable, and slicer visual containers without rejection dialogs or unknown-visual placeholders, pre-refresh
unproven: canvas rendering with data (requires manual dummy-partition refresh; screen-control was declined this session)
pie/donut slice values and descending sort with data
matrix populated cells and hierarchy expansion
slicer item list and selection behavior
next: After a manual (or approved automated) 'Refresh now' + Save in Desktop, re-run the screenshot oracle per page and verify the expected values (Alpha=25/Beta=45 pie slices, 2025/2026 matrix columns, Alpha/Beta slicer items, line 2025=30/2026=40)
Then and only then advance feature_catalog proof levels beyond desktop-golden-pending
